resolution_policy.primary_library_rule: Use the normalized candidate_library as the single ownership library.
resolution_policy.secondary_library_rule: Preserve every additional candidate library as a secondary relationship.
resolution_policy.deletion_policy: No relationships removed; no entries deleted.

rules.name: All core evaluation paths MUST be deterministic for fixed inputs and configuration in the deterministic writing architecture.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Human-like quality MUST be operationalized via multi-dimensional rubrics including coherence, continuity, dialogue realism, style consistency, and human-likeness discrimination.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Every validator MUST have documented thresholds and associated failure modes in failure_mode_library.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Prompt sensitivity and cross-run stability MUST be measured explicitly for all judge and scoring subsystems.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Template echo detection MUST run on any output produced under few-shot or example-based prompting regimes.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Voice preservation and style drift metrics MUST be applied before and after any automated editing or post-processing step.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Benchmarks MUST include long-form narrative and multi-turn dialogue fixtures with seeded continuity and memory challenges.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: All evaluation components MUST map to entries in evaluation_library, benchmark_fixture_library, failure_mode_library, voice_library, and cadence_library.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Each paragraph must include controlled sentence-length burstiness rather than a flat medium-length distribution.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Scene-to-scene residue must carry forward with controlled decay and bounded similarity.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Dialogue must exhibit non-uniform turn lengths and controlled overlap or interruption patterns.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Character disfluency rates must match trait- and tension-specific ranges.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Editing passes may not reduce entropy and idiosyncrasy below the configured preservation floor.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Style-preservation edits must restore voice markers when cleanup operations over-normalize prose.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Sentence-length variance must stay above the configured lower bound for the active cadence profile.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Lexical entropy per sentence must remain within corpus-relative min/max thresholds.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Clause-depth runs must be bounded; the system may not emit too many consecutive high-depth or low-depth sentences.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Every paragraph must be assigned an information-density band and must conform to that band's density constraints.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Narrative pressure must evolve within configured slope bounds and may not flatten unintentionally inside pressure-building scenes.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Register drift per sentence and per paragraph must remain inside the allowed drift window for the active voice.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Character or author idiosyncrasies must be present often enough to preserve voice, but not so often that they become caricature.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: In POV-deep scenes, free indirect discourse blend must remain within configured narrator/character mixing bounds.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: All production evaluation paths must be deterministic for fixed inputs, versions, and configuration.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: AI-generated reflections or rule proposals may never directly modify production rules.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Human approval is mandatory for rule acceptance, benchmark promotion, and override of critical regressions.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Systemic-versus-one-off failure classification must use deterministic clustering or deterministic feature analytics in primary workflows.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Style fingerprints must be versioned and frozen between releases unless changed through governance.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Multi-pass pipelines must preserve strict schema contracts between generation, refinement, and enforcement stages.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Production runtime style enforcement must be rule-based or use frozen numeric thresholds from hybrid evaluators.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Long-form coherence must be backed by structured continuity state rather than raw-context recall alone.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: State transitions must be logged as explicit diffs and may not retroactively rewrite canonical state without governance.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Reflexion-style self-reflection may run only in sandboxed improvement loops, never as a live production writer or updater.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Promotion decisions must reject Pareto-unsafe changes that improve one dimension while dropping another below minimum thresholds.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Every detected failure must be logged to an append-only structured failure ledger.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: External dependency changes, including evaluator or model-version changes, require fresh benchmark replay before promotion.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Failure taxonomy changes must be versioned and may not silently rewrite historical labels.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Only validated failures may be promoted into benchmark fixtures.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Benchmark promotion requires human approval before a fixture becomes part of replayable suites.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Regression suites must score outputs across multiple dimensions rather than a single aggregate score alone.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: Evaluator prompts, thresholds, and model versions must be frozen for any baseline used in promotion decisions.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: System changes must pass sandbox evaluation before shadow evaluation.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.

rules.name: No change may be promoted to production without benchmark replay against the relevant fixture set.
rules.notes: Normalized from source extract block; original wording preserved in raw_text.
